block_changes_added_shape_check.name: block_changes_added_shape_check
block_changes_added_shape_check.value: "block_changes"."kind" <> 'added' or ("block_changes"."previous_block_id" is null and "block_changes"."current_block_id" is not null)

block_changes_deleted_shape_check.name: block_changes_deleted_shape_check
block_changes_deleted_shape_check.value: "block_changes"."kind" <> 'deleted' or ("block_changes"."previous_block_id" is not null and "block_changes"."current_block_id" is null)

block_changes_modified_shape_check.name: block_changes_modified_shape_check
block_changes_modified_shape_check.value: "block_changes"."kind" <> 'modified' or ("block_changes"."previous_block_id" is not null and "block_changes"."current_block_id" is not null)

block_changes_moved_shape_check.name: block_changes_moved_shape_check
block_changes_moved_shape_check.value: "block_changes"."kind" <> 'moved' or ("block_changes"."previous_block_id" is not null and "block_changes"."current_block_id" is not null)

translation_corrections_scope_shape_chec.name: translation_corrections_scope_shape_check
translation_corrections_scope_shape_chec.value:
("translation_corrections"."scope" = 'global' and "translation_corrections"."block_id" is null)
        or ("translation_corrections"."scope" = 'block' and "translation_corrections"."block_id" is not null)
